pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh, which explicitly creates this directory and downloads the images into it.
Verified from export_result.sh, which specifically checks for the existence and modification time of this file path as instructed in the task description.
Verified from export_result.sh, which explicitly checks for the existence and content of this conditions CSV file as instructed in the task description.
Verified from setup_task.sh, which executes three separate curl commands to download exactly 3 face images.
Verified from task.json description, which explicitly instructs the user to set the 'Valence' slider labels to 'Negative, Neutral, Positive'.
Verified from task.json description, which explicitly instructs the user to set the 'Arousal' slider labels to 'Calm, Neutral, Excited'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an emotional rating experiment using 3 real public domain face images from Wikimedia Commons, downloaded to '/home/ga/Documents/Stimuli'. The experiment must be saved to '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/emotional_ratings.psyexp' and utilize a conditions file at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/faces.csv'. The experiment must feature a Valence slider with labels 'Negative', 'Neutral', 'Positive', and an Arousal slider with labels 'Calm', 'Neutral', 'Excited'.
